<!-- Re-run `npm run docs` (or `python scripts/generate_docs.py`) after
     changing the function it describes. The pre-commit hook will block
     a commit that changes a function without regenerating its doc. -->

# AG Lex — function reference

Auto-generated documentation for every function and class in the
project. The folder tree below mirrors the source tree.

## How this works

- One markdown file per source module, in a folder structure that
  mirrors the source tree.
- Each function block shows its signature, the docstring/leading
  comment from the code, and the line where it lives.
- A pre-commit hook (see `tools/hooks/pre-commit`) runs
  `python scripts/generate_docs.py --check` and blocks commits
  whose code/doc are out of sync. Regenerate locally with:

  ```
  npm run docs
  ```
- Bug history lives in [BUGS.md](BUGS.md) and is append-only —
  every fixed bug stays in the log forever so we can trace
  how each function evolved.
